query:
insert into AnnotatedFileOrigins (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                filepath,
                base_origin_hash
            )
            values (
                $1,
                $2,
                $3,
                $4
            )
            on conflict (product_id, filepath, base_origin_hash)
            do update set
                last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr
